case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS CORDOVA RONALD

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORDOVA RONALD
